data.name: LUMA.AI — Hallucination Detection
data.description: LLM Uncertainty and Hallucination Control platform. Monitors token-level probability distributions inline during generation using WEPR and EPR entropy algorithms — 35%+ detection of context-missing hallucinations at ~80µs per token. Cinematic Next.js 14 frontend with live OpenAI vs LUMA split-screen comparison and real-time Tavily-powered citation grounding.

data.name: MCP Security Research
data.description: Hands-on security research on Model Context Protocol servers in production. Demonstrates four real attack classes — prompt injection, tool poisoning, data exfiltration, unauthorised access — with a before/after structure: vulnerable baseline, working exploit, and hardened mitigation. Co-authored with Coventry University professors.

data.name: Production Agentic AI Template
data.description: Battle-tested template for agentic AI systems that actually ship. Covers agent memory (short-term vs long-term, vector DB retrieval, summarisation pipelines), automated eval frameworks (trajectory, output quality, cost-aware), multi-agent orchestration with asyncio, and full LangSmith + OpenTelemetry observability. Built from real enterprise deployments.

data.name: GPT Built from Scratch
data.description: Full GPT implementation assembled from first principles: self-attention, multi-head attention, transformer blocks, BPE tokeniser, KV-Cache, grouped query attention, and a complete training loop. Also includes all neural network primitives (backprop, activations, loss functions, dead ReLU detection) built from scratch without frameworks.

data.name: WhaleFlow Intelligence
data.description: AI-powered crypto investment platform using a 3-agent system: Whale Detector identifies top-performing whale traders, Market Validator runs dual-timeframe technical analysis (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands via MCP integration), and Performance Forecaster generates short/long-term investment guidance. Includes an interactive Arena trading simulator.

data.name: CyberIntelligence
data.description: Web attack detection system using a custom ANN classifier trained on an in-house labelled dataset. Used nmap for network reconnaissance and Postman for API-level attack simulation to generate training data. Achieved reliable classification of attack patterns on live infrastructure.
